---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
---

Hello, I’m Conner Robertson — a student-athlete and aspiring business professional with interests in baseball, analytics, entrepreneurship, and technology.

This website highlights my background, projects, and experience. I am especially interested in combining data, performance, and strategy to solve real-world problems.

## Interests

- Business and entrepreneurship projects
- Baseball performance and player development
- Data visualization and coding in R
- Professional portfolio development

## Beyond the classroom

I value teamwork, discipline, and continuous improvement. My experiences in athletics and academics have shaped the way I approach leadership, preparation, and long-term growth.



*


:::{layout-ncol=2}
![](images/IMG_9159.JPG){.profile-pic}



![](images/IMG_7592.JPG){.profile-pic}
:::
